Home / Screen Recording & Video Capture / ShareX

ShareX — open source alternative

Windows-only screen capture and file sharing.

Strengths

  • Huge feature set for screenshots, GIFs and recordings.
  • Custom uploader destinations (including self-hosted).
  • Free forever.

Weaknesses

  • Windows only.
  • UI is dense and intimidating for newcomers.
  • No built-in cloud sharing service.
License: GPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Self-host onlyDesktop: Windows

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

ShareX is used as an alternative to

Loom

Quick screen and webcam video recordings for async updates.

See all alternatives →
